quick_skim.title: TGV-KV: Text-Grounded KV Eviction for Vision-Language Models
quick_skim.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) inherit the auto-regressive generation paradigm and cache the keys and values (KV) of all previous tokens to accelerate inference, resulting in memory consumption that scales linearly with context length. This issue is particularly pronounced in VLMs due to substantial redundancy in the visual modality. Although KV cache eviction approaches can effectively reduce inference memory, they often incur significant performance degradation in VLMs, as most are designed for language models and overlook the inherent gap between text and vision. By systematically analyzing the modality gap in VLMs in this work, we argue that the importance of visual information should be grounded in textual guidance and accordingly propose a Text-Grounded KV Eviction method for VLMs (TGV-KV). TGV-KV comprises three submodules: (1) Text-Vision Budgeting (TVB) assigns budget to each layer based on the mutual information interaction. (2) Text-Weighted Ranking (TWR) assesses the priority of text and ranks vision importance based on weighted text-image attention. (3) Text-Prioritised Retention (TPR) policy strategically preserves text KV to avoid acute information loss. We evaluate TGV-KV across five models with different sizes and architectures, showing that TGV-KV preserves 99.2% full-KV accuracy on the VizWiz-VQA task with LLaVA-NeXT and boosts end-to-end throughput by 52.6% with an extreme retention budget of 5%. Code is available at https://github.com/Danielement321/TGV-KV.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Text-grounded KV cache eviction for vision-language models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向视觉语言模型的文本引导KV缓存驱逐
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向视觉语言模型的文本引导KV缓存驱逐
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向视觉语言模型的文本引导KV缓存驱逐
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes TGV-KV for VLMs, using textual guidance to ground visual token importance during KV eviction, reducing memory while preserving performance.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对视觉语言模型中视觉模态冗余导致KV缓存占用过高的问题，提出文本引导的KV驱逐方法TGV-KV，利用文本信息指导视觉令牌的重要性排序，在减少缓存内存的同时避免性能显著下降，实验表明该方法在多个VLM基准上优于通用驱逐策略。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对视觉语言模型中视觉模态冗余导致KV缓存占用过高的问题，提出文本引导的KV驱逐方法TGV-KV，利用文本信息指导视觉令牌的重要性排序，在减少缓存内存的同时避免性能显著下降，实验表明该方法在多个VLM基准上优于通用驱逐策略。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: KV cache reuse in large language model inference

quick_skim.title: Entropy Gate: Entropy Quenching for Near-Lossless Token Compression in LLM Pipelines
quick_skim.abstract: LLM pipelines waste substantial token budgets on low-information content: repeated context, verbose responses, and redundant boilerplate. We introduce Entropy Gate, a token compression framework applying entropy quenching $-$ a thermodynamic process that progressively freezes out low-energy tokens while preserving semantic fidelity. Each token receives a multi-factor information energy $E(t)$ combining statistical, structural, and positional components. An adaptive quenching schedule $T(τ) = T_0 / (1 + ατ)$ removes tokens whose Boltzmann survival probability $p_i = \exp(-E_i / kT)$ falls below threshold, with a fidelity gate halting compression when energy-weighted similarity drops below $θ$. We prove token selection by descending $E(t)$ maximizes expected semantic preservation, that quenching produces nested survival sets, and that achievable compression approaches the information-theoretic limit $\text{CR} \to 1 - I(P; T)/H(P)$. A Phase 1 heuristic achieves 40-60% compression across five prompt categories while maintaining $S_E > 0.80$, with energy-squared amplification $E \to E^2$ adding 10-25 percentage points. Context deduplication adds 50-70% savings on repeated blocks. Output-side quenching, motivated by findings that brevity improves accuracy, further reduces response overhead. Combined with external memory, reduction composes multiplicatively to 88-96% for agentic workloads. The framework is stateless, model-agnostic, and deploys as an OpenAI-compatible HTTP proxy.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 令牌压缩用于长上下文加速
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 令牌压缩用于长上下文加速
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 令牌压缩用于长上下文加速
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Entropy Gate uses entropy quenching to compress low-information tokens in LLM pipelines, reducing token budgets while preserving semantic fidelity, accelerating inference for long contexts.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 大型语言模型流水线中存在大量低信息冗余令牌，浪费计算与内存资源。本文提出Entropy Gate框架，借鉴热力学熵淬火过程，依据令牌的信息能量（结合统计、结构和位置因素）自适应移除低能量令牌，并通过保真门控保证语义接近。该方法可有效压缩令牌序列，在近无损前提下显著降低推理开销，尤其适用于长上下文场景，间接支持缓存优化。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 大型语言模型流水线中存在大量低信息冗余令牌，浪费计算与内存资源。本文提出Entropy Gate框架，借鉴热力学熵淬火过程，依据令牌的信息能量（结合统计、结构和位置因素）自适应移除低能量令牌，并通过保真门控保证语义接近。该方法可有效压缩令牌序列，在近无损前提下显著降低推理开销，尤其适用于长上下文场景，间接支持缓存优化。
